column5: fly.pieter.com went from $0 to $1M ARR in just 17 days. $87K MRR in 17 days. First project ever to scale this fast. Simple flight tracking product. 320K people flown in the visualization.
column12: Fastest $0-$1M ever documented. Simple product massive traction.
column16: Speed + simplicity + viral loop = $1M ARR in 17 days. Launch fast ship fast.

column5: $420K/mo revenue record at 80% profit. Portfolio: PhotoAI $161K/m + ReadMAKE $93K/m + Nomads.com $61K/m + InteriorAI $43K/m + levelsio.com $34K/m + RemoteOK $29K/m. AI products 62% of revenue remote work only 23%.
column12: AI pivot from remote work paid off massively. Portfolio diversification.
column16: Portfolio approach: 6 products diversified revenue. AI pivot doubled income. Book + merch + X income 14%.

column5: Interior AI has >99% profit margins. GPU bill $200/month for 21K designs/month = 1 cent per render. No character training like PhotoAI helps costs. Shared VPS $500/mo. Total $250/mo costs on $45K MRR = $44730 profit.
column12: 99% margins possible with AI products if optimized right. No character training = cheap inference.
column16: Minimal infrastructure for AI products. Shared hosting + cheap GPU inference = 99% margins.

column5: Self-taught developer shipped 40+ startups. Did it all himself while living digital nomad life in 40+ countries 150+ cities. Lex Fridman podcast appearance increased revenue 2.5x with PhotoAI going up 3x.
column12: Podcast appearances = massive revenue multiplier. 40+ startups solo = volume approach proven.
column16: Volume approach: 40+ startups solo. Media appearances 2.5x revenue boost. Ship more learn more.

column5: First bootstrapped SaaS hit $20K MRR in 30 days. Second one hit $61K MRR in 53 days using same strategies. 6 proven playbooks: Waitlist + Wave Surfer + Language Arbitrage + AI Search + Signal Search + High Ticket Ad.
column12: Repeatable playbook for SaaS growth. 6 strategies proven at $20K-$300K MRR scale.
column16: 6 playbooks: Waitlist scarcity + Wave ride trends + Language arbitrage markets + AI Search + Signal Search + High Ticket Ads.

column5: Portfolio: Contact.so $300K/month + Mentions.so $20K/month + Kleo.so ~$61K/month. Most customers came from LinkedIn NOT X. LinkedIn undervalued channel that many on X dismiss. Repeatable system not luck.
column12: LinkedIn > X for B2B SaaS customer acquisition. Multi-product portfolio approach.
column16: LinkedIn underrated for B2B. System > luck. Portfolio approach: 3 products $380K+ MRR combined.

column5: 2026 AI Predictions: 1) SaaS and agents merge completely - every SaaS becomes agent platform or dies. 2) Google crushes OpenAI feels heat. 3) Outcome-based pricing eating subscriptions. 4) Micro-companies explode. 5) $1M+ revenue/employee achievable.
column12: SaaS-Agent convergence mandatory 2026. Build AI-native not AI-added. Outcome pricing = arbitrage vs subscriptions.
column16: Build agent platforms not just SaaS. Outcome-based pricing > subscriptions. Micro-companies viable at scale.

column5: 2026 is GREATEST time to build startup in 30 years. 20 MEGA shifts. Claude Code killed engineering bottleneck. Constraint is no longer 'can we build' but 'do we understand workflow deeply enough'. Ex-operators encoding tribal knowledge into agents win.
column12: Domain expertise > coding ability. Operators become founders. Claude Code eliminated engineering constraint.
column16: Domain knowledge + AI tools = moat. Engineering bottleneck dead. Best time to build in 30 years.

column5: 30 Startup Ideas 2025: 1) 99agents - 99designs but AI everything $9.99 each $100M/year opp. 2) Second opinion AI DM service $20/mo. Pattern: Take service business + automate with agents = SaaS margins at service prices.
column12: Service-to-SaaS via agents = massive opportunity. $9.99 price point at scale.
column16: Service businesses + AI agents = SaaS margins. Low price high volume model. 99agents pattern.

column5: No-Code SaaS truth: YES you can build MVP get paying users hit $10K MRR with Supabase Stripe. NO you wont scale forever - performance costs custom logic will choke you. No-code = fastest path to revenue. Code = only path to scale.
column12: No-code MVP then migrate to code. Speed vs scale tradeoff.
column16: No-code for $0-$10K MRR validation. Code when scaling. Dont over-engineer early.

column5: Mercor scaled $1M to $100M ARR in 11 months = fastest growing company in world. 41% monthly growth 2024. 55% January. 87% February. Profited $1M+ last month. NO SALES TEAM - only founders do sales. All growth organic word-of-mouth.
column12: No sales team to $100M ARR. Word of mouth only. AI hiring platform.
column16: Product-led growth at extreme scale. No sales team. Organic referrals only. Founders sell.

column5: Mercor founders: Harvard/Georgetown dropouts bonded over high school debate. Platform uses LLMs to assess candidates predict job performance. Powers hiring at top AI labs. $100M Series B at $2B valuation. Key investors: Jack Dorsey Peter Thiel Larry Summers.
column12: AI hiring platform pattern. LLM assessment of candidates. High-ticket B2B enterprise.
column16: AI hiring assessment market. LLM predicting job performance. Debate champions turned founders.

column5: Vibe coding coined by Andrej Karpathy. AI-powered software dev environments: build apps in natural language not code. Mix of no-code + coding assistant + full IDE. 2026 platforms: Replit Cursor Lovable Bolt.new Base44. LLMs + instant hosting + collaboration.
column12: Vibe coding = new category. Natural language to apps. IDE evolution 2026.
column16: Build apps via conversation not code. Replit Cursor Lovable = key platforms. Instant hosting built-in.

column5: 2026 founder trends: SaaS is Dead Long live SaaS - okay to call yourself SaaS Founder again not just AI Founder. AI + Claude Code makes building amazing SaaS products in every niche easier than ever. VCs expanding beyond AI-first in 2026.
column12: SaaS founder positioning acceptable again. Not everything needs to be AI-first for VC.
column16: SaaS founder branding works again. Claude Code democratized building. Niche SaaS opportunities.
